question.text: When an InvIT's borrowings are between 25% and 49% of the value of InvIT assets, which of the following is required?

answer.text: Credit rating and approval of unit holders
AAA credit rating and track record of 6 distributions

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under InvIT Regulations, if borrowings are between 25% to 49% of the value of InvIT Assets, credit rating and approval of unit holders is required. **The Trap:** AAA credit rating and track record of 6 distributions are additional requirements for borrowings between 49% and 70%, not for 25-49% range. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The tiered borrowing framework adds progressively stricter conditions: 25-49% needs credit rating + unit holder approval; 49-70% additionally needs AAA rating + restricted use + 6 distributions history.
